query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(*) as projectCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sendReady.sendReadyContacts > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sendReady.sendReadyContacts = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cp.projectId, SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
  FROM contactProjects cp
  INNER JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  GROUP BY cp.projectId
) sendReady ON sendReady.projectId = p.id
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.priority;

LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cp.projectId, SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
  FROM contactProjects cp
  INNER JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  GROUP BY cp.projectId

WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.priority;
